title: Days with My Stepsister
sourceNotes: Single-cour 12-episode TV anime (2024). Source material is Mikawa Ghost's light novel; the official manga adaptation (AniList id 130837) tracks the story chapter-by-chapter and has since caught up past the anime's coverage, so it is used here for finer-grained chapter mapping instead of LN volumes. The anime adapts manga chapters 1-23 (roughly LN vols. 1-4). Manga ongoing (current ch. ~36 as of mid-2026).
